Name: Vermilion Flower
Story: A vermilion flower lurched over the jagged sand. It cannot outgrow its besieging captor; it can only hope to stretch skyward.

Name: Amber Fossil
Story: The cave hides a mosquito trapped in an amber fossil, sealed in its golden tomb since before the age of names, for time does not release what it has chosen to keep.

Name: Aureolin Ring
Story: A ring of aureolin gold, beautiful and warm as a dying sun, though every scholar who has written of it agrees on one thing: those who wear it near the onyx fog do not come back the same, if they come back at all.

Name: Viridian Frog
Story: Its incandescent vertebrae segregates the viridian frog from any possible kin. What we deem beautiful quietly isolates the frog from its own home.

Name: Cerulean Crystal
Story: A cerulean crystal humming with forgotten starlight, its facets etched by no mortal hand, said to whisper the names of lost oceans to those who dare hold it in moonless dark.

Name: Amethyst Statue
Story: Do not gaze into the eyes of the amethyst statue. There is no point of return from there.

Name: Onyx Fog
Story: Heed the warnings of the aureolin ring, for the onyx fog is hungry. Prowl through the nightfall and the haze will not hesitate to consume the light.

Name: Ivory Bones
Story: Ivory bones worn smooth by centuries of reverent hands, each one carved with sigils that glow faintly when the night grows too quiet and something old begins to listen.
